title: colysis bolsteri
intro: Colysis bolsteri is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to Sri Lanka, and its medicinal properties include its ability to be used as a diuretic and to help lower blood pressure due to its high levels of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Colysis bolsteri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have antioxidant properties. Colysis bolsteri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
